component.name: Study Calculator
component.summary: Physics, chemistry, symbolic math, vectors and a unit converter, with learning materials

description.p: Study Calculator is a desktop study aid for high-school and early undergraduate science. Pick a formula, fill in every field but one, and it computes the missing quantity — solving for any variable.

ul.li: Physics — mechanics, thermodynamics, electromagnetism, and waves & optics
Chemistry — a periodic table, molar mass, equation balancing, and solution/acid-base formulas
Symbolic math (CAS) — simplify, expand, factor, differentiate, integrate, series, and solve, with step-by-step explanations
Vectors — 2-D and 3-D magnitude, dot and cross products, angles and projections
A unit converter across length, mass, time, energy, pressure, force, temperature and angle

description.p: Every problem shows built-in learning material — key terms, useful formulas, a step-by-step method and a worked example. The interface is localized in English, Spanish, French, Russian and Ukrainian, switchable at runtime.
